name: ragent
summary: Terminal-first AI coding agent in Rust with TUI and HTTP server; provider-agnostic LLM orchestration, tools, session storage, and background agents.

features.name: Interactive TUI
features.description: Full-screen ratatui TUI with slash commands, streaming chat, provider setup, and log panel

features.name: HTTP Server (REST + SSE)
features.description: Axum-based server to drive agent programmatically with SSE streaming

features.name: Multi-provider LLM support
features.description: Provider registry with built-in providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Copilot, Ollama, generic) and extensible provider trait

features.name: Tool system
features.description: Built-in tools (file ops, shell, grep) and extended tools (multiedit, patch, webfetch, office/PDF, plan delegation)

features.name: Session persistence
features.description: SQLite-backed session storage for persistent conversation history

features.name: Teams & background agents
features.description: Task manager to spawn and manage sub-agents and team coordination APIs

features.name: Prompt optimization
features.description: /opt command and POST /opt endpoint implementing many frameworks

features.name: Provider permission system
features.description: Configurable PermissionChecker to gate file writes and shell commands

architecture.description: Wires provider/tool registries, storage, event bus and dispatches to TUI/server/run flows
Core types, session processor, tools, providers, storage, event bus
Terminal UI built with ratatui and tracing integration

apis.description: REST + SSE endpoints in ragent-server crate. AppState built in src/main.rs:399-406
Provider registry and tool registry allow runtime extension via trait impls

gaps.title: Coverage & security CI
gaps.description: Add coverage reporting (tarpaulin/grcov) and cargo-audit to CI
gaps.impact: Prevents undetected regressions and dependency vulnerabilities

gaps.title: Secret masking and logging lint
gaps.description: Ensure secrets are masked in logs and TUI; add grep-based CI lint
gaps.impact: Prevents key leakage in logs and artifacts

gaps.title: Server E2E & SSE tests
gaps.description: Add robust in-process SSE and handler integration tests
gaps.impact: Detect regressions in API used by frontends

gaps.title: Docker image & release packaging
gaps.description: Add Dockerfile(s) and CI image build job

gaps.title: Plugin authoring docs
gaps.description: Document how to write providers/tools and register them
